title: Baroque Works’ Messengers Arrive
description: On pages 12–15, baroque works’ messengers arrive as luffy turns Laboon’s grief into a promise of a future rematch, and the crew receives the Log Pose needed for the Grand Line.
scene: Baroque Works’ Messengers Arrive. Luffy turns Laboon’s grief into a promise of a future rematch, and the crew receives the Log Pose needed for the Grand Line. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 9
dialogue.text: It can't be... That's... the unluckies!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: No wait! There's a perfectly good reason why we're late! It's all because those damn pirates interferred...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: W-We were just on our way back to make a report to the boss! We haven't betrayed the organization...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I have a lot of fun, but I'm not sure if I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It's... the name of our town.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: So you want us to take you there because you lost your ship?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Don't you think that's asking a bit too much,

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 9
dialogue.text: Especially considering you tried to kill the whale and all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Just who are you guys anyways?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: But please! Please take us back to our town and we swear we'll return the favour!

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on baroque works’ messengers arrive. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
